positioning_note: 热插拔：Humanize 广义兼容任何能产出 HTML PPT 的下游 skill——brief 是普通 markdown+JSON，谁都能读。本表只是把『我们真实跑通且输出稳定』的路线标出来：中文推荐 guizang-ppt-skill，英文推荐 frontend-slides / beautiful-html-templates。其他下游可以接，跑通欢迎反馈，support_level 据实更新。

support_levels.full: brief 出口 + 渲染后演讲体检（--qa-from）都已在真实渲染产物上验证过
support_levels.brief+qa-verified: brief 出口可用，且演讲体检（--qa-from）已在该渲染器的真实渲染产物上完整跑通（扫描→发现→修复→复检）；渲染器专属失败模式规则尚未沉淀
support_levels.brief-only: brief 出口可用；演讲体检（--qa-from）这条腿尚未在该渲染器的真实产物上验证，不承诺

best_for: v0.6.4 由 Humanize 发 brief，guizang-ppt-skill 原生渲染
renderers.v0_6_4_note: Humanize writes guizang-production-prompt.md (the brief). The downstream guizang-ppt-skill reads it and renders natively to outputs/guizang-rendered/. Post-render QA is run via --qa-from on the downstream's HTML.

renderers.support_note: v0.9.1: brief exit + real --qa-from checkup remain verified on docs/showcase/hermes-agent-mastery/en/ppt/index.html, and the English renderer now has 5 renderer-specific static failure modes: horizontal overflow, low contrast, hyphenation noise, font contract missing, and image alt text missing. This closes the gap that kept it at brief+qa-verified.
best_for: 英文默认至少5个真实预览
v0.6.4 由 Humanize 发 brief，beautiful-html-templates 原生渲染
renderers.v0_6_4_note: Humanize writes beautiful-html-templates-production-prompt.md (the brief). The downstream beautiful-html-templates reads it and renders natively to outputs/beautiful-rendered/. Post-render QA is run via --qa-from on the downstream's HTML.
html-ppt is a legacy renderer slot. v0.6.4 production paths are guizang (zh) and frontend-slides / beautiful-html-templates (en).

renderers.support_note: v0.9.1: brief exit + real --qa-from checkup remain verified on docs/showcase/v0.9-frontend-slides/ppt/index.html, and the English renderer now has 5 renderer-specific static failure modes: horizontal overflow, low contrast, hyphenation noise, font contract missing, and image alt text missing. This closes the gap that kept it at brief+qa-verified.
best_for: v0.6.4 由 Humanize 发 brief，frontend-slides 原生渲染
renderers.v0_6_4_note: Humanize writes frontend-slides-production-prompt.md (the brief). The downstream frontend-slides reads it and renders natively to outputs/frontend-slides-rendered/. Post-render QA is run via --qa-from on the downstream's HTML.

renderers.display_name: Humanize PPT 演讲体检 (Post-Render QA Loop)
best_for: 演讲体检：逐页核对渲染结果和大纲页的差异
把『只能看、不能讲』的页揪出来
写 fix_prompt.md 给下游 skill 重渲
锁定 known-good 视觉基准
renderers.v0_6_4_note: New in v0.6.4. The loop is launched via `python3 scripts/humanize_ppt.py --qa-from <rendered.html> --out <previous out> --renderer guizang --guizang-style A --max-qa-iterations 3`.

best_for: 无下游 deck 时也能先上台讲
用 slide_plan.json + speaker_intent.md 生成独立演讲 shell
演讲稿面板、翻页状态、计时器、S/左右键快捷键
不抢下游 deck 的视觉主权
renderers.v0_9_1_note: Humanize writes a standalone presenter-shell.html even when no downstream rendered deck exists. If a final deck exists, outputs/presenter/index.html can still iframe/control it.
